title: aphora biflora
intro: Aphora biflora, also known as the double-flowered or two-flowered aphora, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as soothe digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Aphora biflora can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and provide health benefits.
